AddTbspProtocolBlocking.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters
AddTbspProtocolBlocking.ip: Protected object IP address of the DDoS Advanced Protection Package
AddTbspProtocolBlocking.protocolPortList.type: Protocol type for DDoS Advanced Protection Package blocking, including icmp, tcp, and udp
AddTbspProtocolBlocking.protocolPortList.portBegin: Start port value for protocol blocking in the DDoS Advanced Protection Package
AddTbspProtocolBlocking.protocolPortList.portEnd: End port value for protocol blocking in the DDoS Advanced Protection Package
